action_items: CRITICAL: Add 'pastry_ops' and 'menu_engineering_grp' to ROLE_SIDEBAR_ACCESS in /app/client/components/site/Sidebar.tsx (lines 116-129). Currently these groups are defined in NAV_ITEMS but not in the role access lists, so they're filtered out for all roles.
Verify Chef Gio Training item is correctly placed under events_catering group in NAV_ITEMS
Verify Retail Operations item is correctly placed under hotel_ops group in NAV_ITEMS
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.tsx line 116-129: ROLE_SIDEBAR_ACCESS is missing 'pastry_ops' and 'menu_engineering_grp' entries for all roles. These groups are defined in NAV_ITEMS (lines 146-159) but won't be visible because they're not in the access lists.

The 'default' role (line 128) should include all groups: ['culinary_ops', 'pastry_ops', 'menu_engineering_grp', 'daily', 'intelligence', 'events_catering', 'financial', 'hotel_ops', 'guest_concierge', 'admin_system']
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend iter245 endpoints all working. Mobile iter245 tab working. Desktop panels (VIP Atlas, Support, Enterprise BI, Maestro BQT) all load correctly. Main issue is sidebar reorganization - need to add pastry_ops and menu_engineering_grp to ROLE_SIDEBAR_ACCESS in Sidebar.tsx.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: Sidebar.tsx ROLE_SIDEBAR_ACCESS (lines 116-129) does not include 'pastry_ops' or 'menu_engineering_grp' groups. These groups are defined in NAV_ITEMS but filtered out during rendering because they're not in any role's access list. Fix: Add these group IDs to the appropriate roles in ROLE_SIDEBAR_ACCESS.
